name: docspec
description: Universal documentation specification and toolchain — generates structured, machine-readable documentation from any codebase

scripts.build:site: cd site && pnpm install && pnpm -r build
scripts.build:ts: cd typescript/processor && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:all: npm run build:java && npm run build:site && npm run build:ts
scripts.test:all: npm run test:gates && npm run test:e2e

author: Gustavo Aniceto
